critical_findings.failure_mode: [S1] deny_indeterminate_failure path is effectively unreachable with current indeterminate mapping.
critical_findings.impact: Dead schema vocabulary obscures real routing behavior.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Either realign reproducibility mapping or remove unreachable rationale code from schema and code.

critical_findings.failure_mode: [S2] require_review uses blocked execution state with non-blocked publication/decision flags.
critical_findings.impact: Consumers can misread artifact usability before review.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Align publication_blocked/decision_blocked semantics with require_review enforcement intent.

critical_findings.failure_mode: [S3] expected_decision defaults to deny when omitted.
critical_findings.impact: Chaos scenarios can silently misclassify require_review paths.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Require explicit expected_decision in scenario validation.

required_fixes.description: Remove or make reachable deny_indeterminate_failure rationale path.
Align require_review blocked flags with execution status semantics.
Require explicit expected_decision in chaos scenarios.

watch_items: Expand indeterminate-path fixture coverage in chaos or golden-path corpus.
failure_mode_summary: Trust-boundary review was conditionally positive but identified critical schema/logic alignment issues and gating semantics gaps.
